steps.t: Grapes can be found growing upon trellises in the Vineyards of Lórien. Glasnír has asked you to collect some grapes for the new wine. No banquet would…
The tub is in the Vineyards of Lórien. You should take the grapes to tub to be crushed.
Glasnír is in the Vineyards of Lórien. You should let Glasnír know that you have collected grapes and crushed the berries as he wished.
